title: (Deprecated) Create a video package
content:
Use this endpoint to create a video package. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{28%}|v1.2{36%}|v1.3{36%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/catalog/video_package/create/| /v1.3/catalog/video_package/create/| |Request parameter name |`name`|`video_package_name`| |Request parameter data type |`bc_id`: number
`catalog_id`: number|`bc_id`: string
`catalog_id`: string| |Response parameter name |`dpa_video_package_id`|`shopping_ads_video_package_id`| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request content type.
Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |bc_id {required}|string| Business Center ID. | |catalog_id {required}|string| Catalog ID.| |video_package_type {required}|string| Video package type. Currently, only `GREEN_SCREEEN` is supported.| |videos {+conditional}|object[]| List of videos that will be used to create the video pakcage. This field is required when `video_package_type` is `GREEEN_SCREEN`.| #|video_id {+conditional}|string|Video ID. This field is required when `video_package_type` is `GREEEN_SCREEN`.| #|is_green_screen_video {+conditional}|boolean|Whether this is a green screen video. In the list of videos, you need to and can only have one green screen video. This field is required when `video_package_type` is `GREEEN_SCREEN`.| |music_id {+conditional}| string|Music ID. This field is required when `video_package_type` is `GREEEN_SCREEN`.| |template_id {+conditional}|string|Template ID. This field is required when when `video_package_type` is `GREEEN_SCREEN`| |video_package_name|string|Name of the video package that you are about to create. If not specified, a name will be automatically generated in the format of `[VIDEO_TYPE]_[CREATE_TIME]`. For example, GreenScreenVideo_20210720_17:20. UTC+0 time will be used in generating video package names.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code cURL cURL) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/catalog/video_package/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: xxxx \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "bc_id": 6725320885500118022, "catalog_id": 6986901069595002626, "video_package_type": "GREEN_SCREEN", "videos": [ {"video_id": "v07033g50000c38pjfoupb082t6ln5f0", "is_green_screen_video": false}, {"video_id": "v10033g50000c4574b3c77uaa2tq5100", "is_green_screen_video": true}, {"video_id": "v07033g50000c23ptb2h6o7cqvaadut0", "is_green_screen_video": false} ], "template_id": "6992826957676134402", "video_package_name": "green screen generation", "music_id": "6904951200983285762" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{40%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{45%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string| The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data|object| Returned data.| #|shopping_ads_video_package_id|string| ID of the video package that has just been created.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "20210810121500010244053018340BC3B3", "data": { "shopping_ads_video_package_id": "4c703748-e408-4364-9798-44970f85be23" } } (/code) ```
